nasb.text: But the king will rejoice in God; Everyone who swears by Him will glory, For the mouths of those who speak lies will be stopped.

esv.text: But the king shall rejoice in God; all who swear by him shall exult, for the mouths of liars will be stopped.

cnv.text: 但王必因　神歡喜； 所有指著　神起誓的，都必可以誇耀； 說謊的人的口卻必被塞住。

ccb.text: 但王要因上帝而欢欣， 凡信靠祂的人必欢喜快乐， 说谎者的口必被封住。

csbs.text: 可是王必因着神而欢喜， 所有指着神起誓的都必夸耀， 因为说谎之人的口必被封住。
